description: Configure the Drupal user registration system for B2B customers by enabling public registration and adding 'Company Name' (Text - plain) and 'Tax ID' (Text - plain) fields to the User entity. Ensure these fields are visible on the registration form. Verify the configuration by creating a new user account with username 'b2b_user', email 'b2b@example.com', Company Name 'TechCorp', and Tax ID 'TX-998877'.
